title: Multi-Agent Routing
description: Run multiple AI agents side by side, route conversations intelligently, and build specialized agent teams.
content_mdx:
# Multi-Agent Routing

One of OpenClaw's most powerful features is the ability to run multiple agents simultaneously and route conversations to the right agent automatically. This is how you build specialized AI teams.

## Why Multiple Agents?

Different agents can have different:
- **Personalities** (professional for work, casual for personal)
- **Expertise** (coding specialist, writing specialist)
- **Permissions** (some agents can execute code, others can't)
- **Models** (fast cheap model for simple tasks, powerful model for complex ones)
- **Memory** (work agent knows your job, personal agent knows your hobbies)

## Agent Configuration

Agents are configured in your OpenClaw config:

```json
{
  "agents": {
    "main": {
      "model": "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022",
      "soul_file": "SOUL.md",
      "user_file": "USER.md"
    },
    "work": {
      "model": "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022",
      "soul_file": "SOUL.work.md",
      "user_file": "USER.work.md"
    },
    "fast": {
      "model": "claude-3-haiku-20240307",
      "soul_file": "SOUL.md"
    },
    "coder": {
      "model": "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022",
      "soul_file": "SOUL.coder.md",
      "tools": ["bash", "file", "web_search"]
    }
  }
}
```

## Routing Rules

Routing rules determine which agent handles each conversation:

```json
{
  "routing": {
    "default": "main",
    "rules": [
      {
        "channel": "discord",
        "guild": "WORK_GUILD_ID",
        "agent": "work"
      },
      {
        "channel": "telegram",
        "user": "123456789",
        "agent": "personal"
      },
      {
        "keyword": ["code", "debug", "script", "function"],
        "agent": "coder"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

## Route by Channel

```json
{
  "routing": {
    "rules": [
      { "channel": "telegram", "agent": "personal" },
      { "channel": "discord", "agent": "work" },
      { "channel": "whatsapp", "agent": "main" }
    ]
  }
}
```

## Route by Keyword

```json
{
  "routing": {
    "rules": [
      {
        "keyword": ["write", "draft", "email", "blog"],
        "agent": "writer"
      },
      {
        "keyword": ["code", "bug", "function", "python", "javascript"],
        "agent": "coder"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

## Switching Agents in Conversation

Users can switch agents mid-conversation:

```
/agent coder
Help me debug this Python script...

/agent main
Now let's talk about something else
```

## The Pi Agent

OpenClaw has a special "Pi" agent — a lightweight, always-available agent for simple tasks:

```bash
# Pi is fast and efficient for simple requests
/pi What's 15% tip on $47.50?
```

Pi uses a smaller, faster model and responds instantly. Great for quick questions.

## Agent Pipelines

Agents can hand off to each other:

```
User: "Write a Python script to scrape news headlines, then deploy it to my server"

→ main agent understands the request
→ routes to coder agent for script writing
→ routes to ops agent for deployment
→ main agent summarizes the result
```

This is configured via the ACP (Agent Control Protocol) system — covered in the advanced track.

## Monitoring Multiple Agents

```bash
openclaw agents list

# Output:
# main    (active)  claude-3-5-sonnet  12 sessions
# coder   (active)  claude-3-5-sonnet   3 sessions
# fast    (idle)    claude-haiku         0 sessions
```

## Load Balancing

For high-traffic scenarios:

```json
{
  "routing": {
    "load_balance": {
      "agents": ["main-1", "main-2", "main-3"],
      "strategy": "round-robin"
    }
  }
}
```

## Best Practices

- **Start simple.** One agent is usually enough. Add more when you have a clear use case.
- **Specialized is better than general.** A coding agent should be great at coding, not everything.
- **Different models for different needs.** Fast model for casual chat, powerful model for complex tasks.
- **Test routing rules.** Check logs to verify routing is working as expected.

## Congratulations — Intermediate Track Complete!

You've mastered:
- Agent persona configuration (SOUL.md, USER.md)
- Memory system (MEMORY.md, daily notes)
- Discord setup
- WhatsApp setup
